issues: 1x silhouette reads as a small blue blob — rabbit ears merge with body at tiny size
orange clock face detail lost at 1x; only color blob survives
dark bg (panel 3) reduces ear contrast — pink ears barely visible against near-black
overall shape is round/squat which aids charm but the pixel clusters produce a slightly mushy read at scale
reasoning: At 4x on both light and dark backgrounds the icon has genuine charm: round blue bomb body, cute pink rabbit ears, friendly orange clock face, small expressive details. The Echoes-of-Wisdom toy aesthetic is clearly present and the silhouette is distinctive enough at 4x. However at 1x (panel 1) the icon shrinks to an indistinct blue-teal cluster — the rabbit ears and clock face disappear entirely, leaving only a vague colored blob with no readable personality. On the dark background the pink ears lose contrast and blend. Sticker test at 1x fails; sticker test at 4x passes. Charm is present but silhouette clarity at actual play size is insufficient for a confident pass.
